parameters.name: entities
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of entity types to include. Valid values: models, relationships, metrics, glossary, ai_analysts. Defaults to all.
parameters.x-gitbook-description-html: Comma-separated list of entity types to include. Valid values: models, relationships, metrics, glossary, ai_analysts. Defaults to all.

models.description: Models with dimensions, measures, filters, and grain
models.x-gitbook-description-html: Models with dimensions, measures, filters, and grain

metrics.description: Defined metrics with expressions and joins

glossary.description: Glossary terms with definitions and mappings

ai_analysts.description: AI analysts with semantic layer access configuration
ai_analysts.x-gitbook-description-html: AI analysts with semantic layer access configuration

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

get.description: Export the full environment configuration including models, relationships, metrics, glossary terms, and AI analysts. Supports filtering by entity type and output format.

leaves.text: Export the full environment configuration including models, relationships, metrics, glossary terms, and AI analysts. Supports filtering by entity type and output format.

get.x-gitbook-description-html: Export the full environment configuration including models, relationships, metrics, glossary terms, and AI analysts. Supports filtering by entity type and output format.

deleted.description: Number of orphaned entities deleted (0 if orphaned=keep)
deleted.x-gitbook-description-html: Number of orphaned entities deleted (0 if orphaned=keep)

unchanged.description: Number of entities that were already up to date
unchanged.x-gitbook-description-html: Number of entities that were already up to date

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

422.description: Validation error — one or more referenced data sources do not exist
422.x-gitbook-description-html: Validation error — one or more referenced data sources do not exist

put.description: Sync (upsert) the environment configuration from a JSON payload. Supports models, relationships, metrics, glossary terms, and AI analysts. Only include the entity types you want to sync — omitted types are left untouched. Blocks if any referenced data source does not exist.

models.description: Models to create or update (matched by name)
models.x-gitbook-description-html: Models to create or update (matched by name)

metrics.description: Metrics to create or update (matched by name)
metrics.x-gitbook-description-html: Metrics to create or update (matched by name)

glossary.description: Glossary terms to create or update (matched by term)
glossary.x-gitbook-description-html: Glossary terms to create or update (matched by term)

ai_analysts.description: AI analysts to create or update (matched by name)
ai_analysts.x-gitbook-description-html: AI analysts to create or update (matched by name)

orphaned.description: What to do with existing entities not present in the payload. "delete" removes them, "keep" (default) leaves them.
orphaned.x-gitbook-description-html: What to do with existing entities not present in the payload. "delete" removes them, "keep" (default) leaves them.

leaves.text: Sync (upsert) the environment configuration from a JSON payload. Supports models, relationships, metrics, glossary terms, and AI analysts. Only include the entity types you want to sync — omitted types are left untouched. Blocks if any referenced data source does not exist.

put.x-gitbook-description-html: Sync (upsert) the environment configuration from a JSON payload. Supports models, relationships, metrics, glossary terms, and AI analysts. Only include the entity types you want to sync — omitted types are left untouched. Blocks if any referenced data source does not exist.

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained from Settings > API Keys. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>
BearerAuth.x-gitbook-description-html: API key obtained from Settings > API Keys. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer
